title: Legacy Console Experience
description: A simple modpack trying to recreate the old LCE feel, with the power of fabric!
body:
**Legacy Console Experience** is a modpack made to bring back that old feeling of turning on you xbox 360 and inserting the minecraft disc in it(although it isn't an exact replica) by mimicking the user interface, textures, sounds and that sort of stuff, enjoy! ### But wait there's still stuff missing as i couldn't find anything to replicate it with: + Crafting menu's still missing as i cannot find anything to edit it with - World creation screen in 1.19.4, because the changes made to it don't allow fancymenu support at the same level + The gamma( the shader is there, it's just disabled by default because it ***destroys*** fps) - 1 to 1 recreation because there needed to be a lot of cut corners to fit fancymenu + The elytra roll, because the Cool Elytra Mod isn't updated to 1.19.4 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Credits
Resourcepack list(and shader too ig)
[catplusdog](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cat-dog-music-disc/) by RufusDragon [Programmer Art +](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/programmer-art/) by Cracker0106 [Legacy Edition](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/legacy-edition-1-15-2/) by lyann [CPHSBC](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgGl-xLlOcs) (not ON by default btw) by CrushedPixel
Modlist
[Bedrockify](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrockify) by juancarloscp52 & lonefelidae16 [Bedrock Skin Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockskinutility) by Camotoy [Bedrock Waters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrockwaters) by 2Retr0 [Cloth config](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/cloth-config) by shedaniel [C2M Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by RelativityMC & ishland [Console Sounds](https://github.com/S-N00B-1/consolesounds) by hattolo (or Hattozo) and updated by S-N00B-1 [Drippy loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen), [Fancymenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu), [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) and [LoadMyResources](https://modrinth.com/mod/load-my-resources) by Keksuccino [Entity texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) by Traben [EntityCulling Fabric](https://github.com/tr7zw/EntityCulling-Fabric) by tr7zw [Essential Mod](https://essential.gg/en/) by Spark Universe [Fabric API](https://fabricmc.net) by FabricMC [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by malte0811 [Iris](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris) by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30 & FoundationGames [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) by tuxed [LEM Client Helper](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/lemclienthelper) by kyrptonaught [Lithium](https://jellysquid.me/projects/) by JellySquid & 2No2Name [Memory Leak Fix](https://github.com/fxmorin/memoryleakfix) by FX - PR0CESS [Midnight Controls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols) by LambdAurora, Motschen [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector, haykam821 & TerraformersMC [No Chat reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) by Aizistral [Old Potions](https://github.com/Abbie5/oldpotions) by Abbie [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) by yurisuika [Sodium](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric) by JellySquid & maintained by IMS212 & Burger individual [Starlight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starlight) by Spottedleaf
LEM
**(please don't bother them about it)** For now there's **only battle** and it's a closed alpha but i think this modpack (1.19.4 only) is compatible with the server for more info about the server read here: [minigames.derpbox.xyz](https://lemsite.derpbox.xyz/)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## not what you were looking for? you could also try [Console Idated](https://modrinth.com/modpack/console-idated) from N00B ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ *Tutorial world can run at a stable 50-60 fps on an i5-7000 w/integrated graphics card though it's a bit laggy in there so it should probably have more fps on other worlds*
